project.title: Landing Page Project
project.description: A saved landing page configuration including design, identity, sections, and items.

id.description: The unique document ID of the project.

userId.description: The Firebase Auth user ID of the owner.

config.description: The full serialized LandingPageConfig JSON structure.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the project was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the project was last updated.

isPublished.description: Whether this landing page is published live.

/projects/{projectId}.description: Collection of saved landing page designs.
